title: 无标题文章
summary: I've been living without an oven for the last year, mostly using the hob to boil or fry food. We just got an oven, and the first thing I make is toad in the hole, turned out amazing, no regrets, except that maybe I feel like I've ingested enough calories for a month
content: I've been living without an oven for the last year, mostly using the hob to boil or fry food. We just got an oven, and the first thing I make is toad in the hole, turned out amazing, no regrets, except that maybe I feel like I've ingested enough calories for a month
